title: Beef Stew with Mediterranean Twist
description: A hearty beef stew infused with the rich flavors of the Mediterranean, featuring intense, peppery notes.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove beef from pot and set aside.
Add garlic, red pepper flakes, and oregano to pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add red wine, scraping up browned bits from pot.
Return beef to pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours.
Stir in olives and artichoke hearts.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
